title: Baby Sprinkle for a Friend
excerpt: A couple months ago we threw our friend Christina a baby sprinkle at my house. It was such a fun and sweet celebration for this mama of twin boys to help welcome a third little guy into their lives. It…
body:
A couple months ago we threw our friend Christina a baby sprinkle at my house. It was such a fun and sweet celebration for this mama of twin boys to help welcome a third little guy into their lives. It was a casual Thursday brunch and these photos were taken by our friend, Flora. Even though we have a separate playroom for the kids, you might notice none of these photos were actually even taken in that room. Toys were all over the living room and in the backyard!

Jack's known many of these kids since he was just weeks old, so it's been really fun watching them all grow up. We had a ball!
